description: It's great, but it's expensive so be sure that you really needed. For me it´s the best for my work.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is a versatile tool that allows you to manage data in an easy and practical way. It is super practical to integrate and compare data in a way that is much easier to visualize. It keeps my work organized and it is easy to migrate the information to share and present.
cons: I think they could improve certain aspects, for example the help section could be more extensive and have more documentation, in addition it would be nice to be able to have multiuser.

review_title: A Review of the Excel Database Tasks as to Their Importance
description: The main business tasks being solved is the transfer of the Excel Database Tasks to a more rigorous database environment. As long as the EDT tasks were documented properly, we didn't have any problems. The EDT task are easy to use and maintain.
author: Johnny J.
pros: Easy to use, as the excellent tool Excel offers a lot of capabilities. Reports and charts are simple to generate. Overall, this is an excellent tool. Besides it being a great visually tool, it is simple to use which made any integration to other tools an easy fit.
cons: The Cons are very limited and are related mostly to processes regarding the software, and its use with other tools. It can be difficult to recover past projects, with some work being lost and unrecoverable, forcing entries to be re-posted. The operational rigors, if any, or not noticeable.

author: Shelly R.
pros: Ability to track work task individual item
cons: Little difficult to setup new jobs, particularly formatting cells and formulas

review_title: EDT: The Best Data Anlysis Software
description: EDT has been my profession companion/partner when it comes to data management tasks.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: User friendly. simply great from data entry task to awesome math functions. makes migration, sharing and presentation of information easy
cons: recovering past projects can sometimes be difficult.

author: Erin K.
pros: I speak with patients on a daily basis and this program allows me to log dates/times/content etc so I can easily go back and find anything Im looking for within seconds. It keeps me organized and allows me to be efficient in my work!
cons: I know there are a lot more functions that I am not familiar with. I plan to become more familiarized and learn more basics so I can be even more efficient with my work.

author: Alisha K.
pros: Excel is a sophisticated program with a wide range of functions. It is simple to create reports and charts, making it a good alternative. Furthermore, the ease of usage allows for easy integration with other technologies.
cons: Excel is a complicated application with many functions. It is a realistic option because reports and graphics can be quickly made. Furthermore, because of its simplicity, it may be simply coupled with other technologies.

description: I have been using this software for about 6 months and I can arrange many different categorizes within an employee data base
author: Lynda D.
pros: The software is great from math equations to just simple data entry for certain projects that need a sorting
cons: Not much but they tend to not email well

review_title: I really like the formulas it helps me calculation and making sums.
description: It helps me in making reports and saves my time . Esay to use and understand. Highly recommended
author: Aasia S.
pros: Esay to use. Easy to understand. Formulas save a lot of time in calculation. It helps me a lot in making reports and adding data. Filters are my most favorite part during making reports.
cons: Complications of few formulas. It should be as easy as making sums. Dragging feature sometimes irritates me during making reports.

author: Stefano D.
pros: Easy, valuable, and reliable. This tool allows the process of very complicated data without being an headache. Very useful especially for small businesses with limited budgets.
cons: The design could be improved. But isn’t essential.

description: At the begining it was hard because I didn't know the basics of data analysis and programming, later on it became easier.
author: Safa S.
pros: This programm helps in research, after data collection most doctors would use it to analyse data.
cons: Its it hard to know the basics, unless you have good knowledge about it, you will struggle using it.

review_title: Opciones importantes y no muy utilizadas
description: Es buena dependiendo de lo que desees hacer con la base de datos. Si tiene claro que deseas hacer es muy buena pero debes saber utilizar bien el programa
author: Gonzalo C.
pros: Se puede combinar, modificar la información de la base de datos a trabajar
cons: Algunas opciones que son difíciles de utilizar y otras que no sirven en el programa

review_title: Ottimo sito di conservazione dei dati
description: La velocità e la manualità dei vari conteggi
author: Maurizio R.
pros: Facile da usare per conteggi vari e preventivi
cons: Non ritengo che ci siano delle migliorie da apportare

description: Overall, descent experience for data entry. An OK program.
author: Dan V.
pros: The program is easy to use visually. The data can be followed while entering and easily edited for user
cons: To recover past projects can sometimes be a challenge, with some work lost and unrecoverable, making the entries having to be re-cast

author: Nadia M.
pros: 1. It calculates figure 2. Easy to use 3. Able to generate graphs
cons: 1. You are not able to type full sentences in 1 line 2. It does not include referencing option
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I have had great experiences with this software for the use of work.
author: karissa B.
pros: The ease of use and calculation. The software is easy to explain ho to use to someone that hasn't used it before as well.
cons: I am unsure what I like least about the software. I am having difficulty with my account through microsoft which doesn't allow me to use any microsoft or excel products from home which is unfortunate.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have used excel in a workplace situation and with our dance club and it's worked ok for both. I am getting better at using the program.
author: Vanessa J.

description: Easy to use, great tool. Excel has a lot of functionality. Easy to create reports, charts. Overall, a great tool.
author: Pedro C.

description: Our company creates many spreadsheets daily. This one is used frequently.
author: Lindsey W.
pros: This program is very easy to use. It is a great spreadsheet program that allows the formulas and can be used as a database.
cons: There is nothing that I do not like about this program. I have not ran into any issues yet! Very easy and simple to use.
